summary: Iteration 38 - Production Verification Complete. All 29 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified for RDV chez Titelli, Sports & Compétitions, Demandes Spécialistes pages. Stripe is configured with LIVE keys (sk_live_*).
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Stripe LIVE mode confirmed: STRIPE_API_KEY starts with sk_live_51RelvgKG28DxZ5CC...
✅ Authentication working for both client (test.client@titelli.com) and enterprise (test.entreprise@titelli.com) accounts
✅ RDV chez Titelli: Categories (8), offers CRUD, romantic subscription (200 CHF/month), invitation acceptance (2 CHF)
✅ Titelli Pro++: Status check, subscription (199 CHF/month) - correctly restricted to enterprise accounts
✅ Sports & Compétitions: Categories (11 sports), matches, teams, competitions - all working
✅ Notifications: Requires auth, returns notifications list
✅ Gamification: Profile endpoint with points, levels (8 levels), badges system
✅ Specialists: Categories (10), search, requests - all working
✅ Lifestyle Passes: 3 passes (Healthy 99 CHF, Better You 149 CHF, MVP 299 CHF)
✅ All Stripe checkout URLs correctly redirect to stripe.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (RDV chez Titelli, Demandes Spécialistes, Lifestyle Passes, Titelli Pro++, Sports & Compétitions, Notifications, Gamification) are fully functional. Stripe is in LIVE mode with real payment processing enabled.
